english_text: I am so embarrassed
I want to hide
My face turned red
I could not look anyone in the eye
I want to dig a hole and hide
That was so humiliating
I cannot believe I did that in public
Everyone was staring at me
I tripped in front of everyone
I called the teacher mom
I accidentally sent the wrong message
I waved at the wrong person
My zipper was open all day
I had food on my face
I said something stupid
I cannot forget that moment
I laughed at the wrong time
I walked into the wrong room
I slipped on the stairs
That memory still haunts me
I spilled coffee on myself
I forgot someone's name mid-conversation
My phone rang during a presentation
I said hi twice to the same person
I pronounced it completely wrong
I thought today was a holiday
I walked into a glass door
My stomach made loud noises
I accidentally liked an old photo
I forgot the words to the song
I overdressed for the occasion
I showed up on the wrong day
I had toilet paper on my shoe
I burped in a quiet room
I choked on water in front of everyone
I fell asleep and snored in class
I accidentally called my boss by a nickname
My card got declined
I responded to a question meant for someone else
I sang out loud thinking I was alone
I stuttered during my speech
I mixed up two people's names
My voice cracked while speaking
I was talking about someone and they heard
I made a typo in a formal email
I wore mismatched socks
I forgot my lines on stage
I sneezed and it was really loud
I tried to be cool but failed
I got caught taking a selfie
I accidentally sent a voice message
I waved goodbye too early
I was the only one in costume
That still makes me cringe
I cannot show my face there again
I am never doing that again
I thought I would die of embarrassment
Everyone laughed at me
I hope they forgot about it
Let us never speak of this again
